Basic information.label: Recommended nozzle temperature
Basic information.tooltip: Recommended nozzle temperature range of this filament. 0 means no set

Bed temperature.label: Cool Plate
Bed temperature.tooltip: Bed temperature when cool plate is installed. Value 0 means the filament does not support to print on the Cool Plate

Bed temperature.label: Engineering plate
Bed temperature.tooltip: Bed temperature when engineering plate is installed. Value 0 means the filament does not support to print on the Engineering Plate

Bed temperature.label: Smooth PEI Plate / High Temp Plate
Bed temperature.tooltip: Bed temperature when Smooth PEI Plate/High temperature plate is installed. Value 0 means the filament does not support to print on the Smooth PEI Plate/High Temp Plate

Bed temperature.label: Textured PEI Plate
Bed temperature.tooltip: Bed temperature when Textured PEI Plate is installed. Value 0 means the filament does not support to print on the Textured PEI Plate

Bed temperature.label: Customized Plate
Bed temperature.tooltip: Bed temperature when cool plate is installed. Value 0 means the filament does not support to print on the Customized Plate

Bed temperature.label: Epoxy Resin Plate
Bed temperature.tooltip: Bed temperature for layers except the initial one. Value 0 means the filament does not support to print on the Epoxy Resin Plate

Model fan.label: Min fan speed threshold
Model fan.tooltip: Part cooling fan speed will start to run at min speed when the estimated layer time is no longer than the layer time in setting. When layer time is shorter than threshold, fan speed is interpolated between the minimum and maximum fan speed according to layer printing time

Model fan.label: Max fan speed threshold
Model fan.tooltip: Part cooling fan speed will be max when the estimated layer time is shorter than the setting value
